auth.signedOut.title: Ecurs — modern education platform
auth.signedOut.description: Sign in or create an account to browse courses, track progress, and use the platform features.

create.step1.title: 🎓 Name your course

home.hero.title: Ecurs — learn more effectively
home.hero.studentDesc: Learn at your own pace and keep track of your progress.
home.hero.teacherDesc: Create courses and paths in one place, and let AI help you prepare materials faster and better.
home.hero.forStudentsDesc: Get lessons, assignments, and a clear learning plan that drives you to action.
home.hero.forTeachersDesc: Create courses, paths, and materials in one dashboard, ready for selling and working with groups.
home.hero.aiSupportDesc: AI helps create content and supports students in their growth.
home.hero.joinTitle: Join the platform and start right away ✨
home.hero.joinDesc1: Choose a course and start right away.
home.hero.joinDesc2: If you teach others — create your own programs and observe real group progress.
